details.test: Task 1: RSVP to free beginner event next 7 days after 6 PM
Task 2: Register for weekend retreat under 200 near San Diego with 4.5+ teacher
Task 3: Create schedule with 3 free events (mindfulness, yoga, dharma talk) in same month
Task 4: Enroll in 4-week intermediate course next month between 50–120 on weekday evenings
Task 5: RSVP to family-friendly wheelchair-accessible weekend event near Boston for children 8+
Task 6: Sign up for monthly Saturday volunteer opportunity 2–4 hours
Task 7: Leave 4-star review with 60+ chars for Loving-Kindness Evening
Task 8: Update notifications to English online events 19–21h, max 3 emails/week
Task 9: Bookmark 5 free online guided meditations (20–40 min, 4.0+ rating, female teachers, next 2 weeks)
